zh.lifeSummary: 當Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith於大約1080年出生在英國越可爾可廷加姆時，她的父親Hugh FitzBaldric37歲，母親Emma Lascelles31歲。她於1101年之後與Robert de Stuteville III結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1140年在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯享年62歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯。

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith was born about 1080, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, her father, Hugh FitzBaldric, was 37 and her mother, Emma Lascelles, was 31. She married Robert de Stuteville III after 1101. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1140, in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith est née environ 1080, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hugh FitzBaldric, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Emma Lascelles, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Stuteville III après 1101. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1140, à Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith um 1080 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh FitzBaldric 37 und ihre Mutter Emma Lascelles 31. Sie hat nach 1101 Robert de Stuteville III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1140 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith è nata il circa 1080 nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Hugh FitzBaldric, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Emma Lascelles, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Stuteville III dopo il 1101. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1140, nel Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithが約1080年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで生まれた時，父Hugh FitzBaldricは37歳，母Emma Lascellesは31歳であった。1101年以後にRobert de Stuteville IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1140年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエストウテヴィレ-eカレスで62歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエストウテヴィレ-eカレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh FitzBaldric(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Lascelles(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1101년 이후 Robert de Stuteville III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1140년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 에스토우테비레-e캘레스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 에스토우테비레-e캘레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh FitzBaldric, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Emma Lascelles, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Stuteville III após 1101. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1140, em Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith родилась около 1080 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh FitzBaldric было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Lascelles, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Stuteville III после 1101 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1140 г. в местности эстоутевилле-eкаллесь, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности эстоутевилле-eкаллесь, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.
